meta.note: 6 hand-curated full cards per essay type, transcribed from INTUITY-one-card-models.pdf (Majid Nashtai, 2026). Each card keeps OPEN, ARGUE (3 lines) and CLOSE together as a single coherent voice/register — this is the master data for essay-galleries.html across all three modes (Introduction reads .open, Body reads .argue, Conclusion reads .close), replacing independent random combination of those sections. The topic blank '...' may appear more than once per line/card by design; it is meant to be filled with the SAME topic string throughout a single card.

cards.close: In conclusion, it is felt that the advantages of ... outweigh the disadvantages.
